how to start investing in stocks

(1) Open a trading account with a SECP-registered broker, (2) Complete KYC (Know Your Customer) verification with your CNIC and bank details, (3) Get a UIN (Unique Identification Number) from NCCPL, (4) Open a CDC sub-account for holding shares electronically, (5) Fund your account, (6) Start placing buy orders.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf
how to open a broker account

Visit the PSX website at www.psx.com.pk to check the list of registered brokers and their branch offices. You can also ask the broker to provide their SECP Broker License Number and TRE Certificate Number. Never invest through an unregistered person.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf
what is psx

PSX stands for Pakistan Stock Exchange. It is the sole securities exchange of Pakistan where shares of publicly listed companies are bought and sold. PSX was formed in 2016 through the merger of the Karachi Stock Exchange (KSE), Lahore Stock Exchange (LSE), and Islamabad Stock Exchange (ISE).

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf

Defensive stocks are shares of companies that provide consistent returns regardless of economic conditions.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf

Examples on PSX include cement companies, steel, and automobile manufacturers, which depend heavily on construction activity and consumer spending.

how to start investing ?

(1) Open a trading account with a SECP-registered broker, (2) Complete KYC (Know Your Customer) verification with your CNIC and bank details, (3) Get a UIN (Unique Identification Number) from NCCPL, (4) Open a CDC sub-account for holding shares electronically, (5) Fund your account, (6) Start placing buy orders.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf
what is SECP

SECP (Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan) is Pakistan's apex securities regulator, responsible for regulating the securities market, insurance sector, and non-banking financial companies. SECP registers brokers, approves IPOs, sets corporate governance standards, and enforces securities laws to protect investors.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf
